title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 455.070 - Proceedings independent of others
text:
455.070.  Proceedings independent of others. — All proceedings under sections 455.010 to 455.085 are independent of any proceedings for dissolution of marriage, legal separation, separate maintenance and other actions between the parties and are in addition to any other available civil or criminal remedies, unless otherwise specifically provided herein.
(L. 1980 S.B. 524 § 13)
